description: To improve cash flow, the company has an agreement to sell some of its accounts receivable to a factoring company.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of eligible invoices to be sold to the factoring company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of current, undisputed invoices from creditworthy customers.

nodes.task_description: Transmit the list of invoices to the factoring company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the invoice data to the factor.

nodes.task_description: Receive the cash advance from the factor (e.g., 85% of the invoice face value).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the incoming cash receipt from the factor.

nodes.task_description: Create a journal entry to record the cash received, reduce accounts receivable, and record the factoring fee expense.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent posts the correct journal entry for the factoring transaction.
